rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
Implementation contracts may only use assign for output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: AGREE contracts in implementations should avoid referencing subcomponent paths not visible at the type level
Guarantee statements in implementation scope are not allowed; use type-level guarantees for output dependencies
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assign statements in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Placing guarantee statements inside component implementation annexes instead of component type annexes
Using assume/guarantee syntax in implementation scope where only assign is valid
